summary: Iteration 28: Full testing of Hönsgården app new features - all tests passed. Backend: 14/14 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All features verified on both Mobile (390x844) and Desktop (1920x800) viewports.
seed_data_creation: Test support ticket created during backend tests with prefix 'TEST:'
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working correctly: 1) Leaderboard shows 15+ fictional Swedish users (Anna, Johan, Sara, Magnus, Lisa, etc.), 2) Friends section shows empty state with invite option, 3) Support page at /support with ticket creation, 4) Statistics graphs fixed and rendering correctly, 5) Improved egg input with +1/+2/+3/... stepper buttons, 6) Share modal has period selector (7/14/30 dagar), 7) All features work on both mobile and desktop viewports.

backend_apis.leaderboard: GET /api/stats/leaderboard - 15+ users with fictional Swedish names verified
backend_apis.friends: GET /api/friends - returns friends list structure correctly

frontend_mobile_390x844.dashboard: Working - shows quick egg buttons, farm stats, weather
frontend_mobile_390x844.leaderboard: Working - shows Anna, Johan, Sara, Magnus, Lisa with egg stats
frontend_mobile_390x844.friends_section: Working - shows 'Du har inga vänner ännu' empty state
frontend_mobile_390x844.support_page: Working at /support - shows tickets, create new ticket button
frontend_mobile_390x844.statistics_graphs: Working - line charts render correctly with Dag/Vecka/Månad filters

frontend_desktop_1920x800.sidebar_navigation: Working - Hem, Ägg, Hönor, Ekonomi, Statistik, Inställningar
frontend_desktop_1920x800.statistics_graphs: Working - charts render with correct dimensions
